violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean inside and outside of big ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in 1 door pepsi cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors are in poor condition and need deep cleaned throughout entire kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove plastic cover on 2 door upright freezer. -Remove covering from top shelf od utility cart and bottom shelf of rack by griddle. -Paint bare wood by drive up window and shelving by ice machine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice catcher in big ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Kitchen needs cleaning. Floors in walk in cooler need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Flooring has multiple tears and needs repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
